description: Canonical registry of all supported provenance link types.

link_types.name: artifact_id
link_types.description: Identifier of the certified AI artifact being purchased or licensed.

link_types.name: certificate_id
link_types.description: Identifier of the CertifiedData certification record for this artifact.

link_types.name: decision_id
link_types.description: Identifier of the AI decision or inference run that triggered this payment.

link_types.name: dataset_id
link_types.description: Identifier of the dataset used in the inference or artifact creation.

link_types.name: model_id
link_types.description: Identifier of the AI model involved in the transaction.

link_types.name: output_id
link_types.description: Identifier of the specific model output or inference result.

link_types.name: receipt_hash
link_types.description: SHA-256 digest of the canonical payment receipt payload. Links this transaction to a prior receipt proof.
link_types.note: Must include 'sha256:' prefix. This is NOT the same as artifact_hash.

link_types.name: external_reference
link_types.description: Free-form external reference string for linking to systems outside CDP.

link_types.name: provenance_metadata
link_types.description: Namespaced key-value pairs for additional provenance context. Keys must use cdp:, partner:, or ext: prefixes.
